name: Template improvement

---

## What should be improved?

Describe the generic automation step or documentation section.

## Why does it matter?

Explain how it improves reproducibility, safety, or portability.

## Suggested approach

Use source-neutral placeholders only.

## Sanitization check

Confirm that the request does not include real provider names, issuer names,
target URLs, credentials, or production data.
